src: A gray and white cat with short fur, bright golden eyes, long white whiskers, black nose, and a white chest patch. Its ears are pointed.
edit: A metal cat statue with silver upper parts and bronze lower parts and paws. The eyes have amber stones, the nose is black onyx, whiskers are silver threads, and the tail coils elegantly.

per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object is sitting upright on a wooden floor, head tilted slightly upwards, with visible wood grains and shadows beneath it, in an indistinct, neutral surrounding.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: the object is lying on a bed with patterned green and white sheets, front paws visible. The surface is soft and slightly crumpled, with blurred natural elements in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: the object is nestled against a gray textured cushion with a tight weave, its head resting comfortably, in softly lit natural light casting gentle shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object is sitting upright on a wooden floor, head tilted slightly upwards. The floor resembles frost-kissed wood grains with shadows beneath. Nearby is a neutral surrounding with a serene winter ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: The object is lying on a bed with snowy-patterned sheets, its front paws visible, resting. The bedding has a frosty green and white design. In the background, blurred icy elements suggest a winter wonderland atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: The object is against a frosty gray cushion with a tight weave, head resting on it. The softly lit environment resembles the glow of a winter afternoon, casting gentle shadows like those on freshly fallen snow.
